query:
UPDATE userProfiles up
INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = up.userId
SET up.assignedBusinessLines = JSON_ARRAY_APPEND(up.assignedBusinessLines, '$', 'Specialty Air')
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(up.assignedBusinessLines, '"Portable Air"')
AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(up.assignedBusinessLines, '"Specialty Air"');
